name: model
description: Review PRs that add or modify models, DiTs, VAEs, encoders, pipelines, arch configs

name: kernel
description: Review PRs that add or modify CUDA/C++/Triton kernels and attention backends

name: training
description: Review PRs that add or modify training methods, distillation, datasets, or distributed training

name: general
description: Review PRs for inference serving, public API, CI, docs, UI, dependencies; fallback reviewer
